prompt: Offline .tox build — a compute-shader particle sim. pointgen1 (a Point Generator POP) making the points, glsl1 (a GLSL POP) with a docked compute shader moving them, and feedback1 (a Feedback POP) closing the sim loop. Tune it with lfo1 (an LFO CHOP) through an Arrays-page uniform named uLfo — and mind the flipped trap versus the TOP: a GLSL POP AUTO-declares Arrays-page uniforms as float arrays, so the compute source must index uLfo[0] and must NOT redeclare 'uniform float uLfo' itself. Search the KB for GLSL POP exemplars before writing the shader. Build as particle_sim (mode tox) with output_dir {{RUN_DIR}} and validate.
